# Delta_R wall scalar rational fit coefficients
# Chimera: Delta_R = asym-RPY (eps<asym_cut), rational fit (asym_cut<=eps<=rpy_cut), 0 (eps>rpy_cut)
# Sup scalar = RPY_fit + Delta_R
#
# h_scale_fit = 0.5  (for Delta_R rational fits)
# h_scale_rpy = 0.5  (for RPY rational fits)
# u = 1/(1 + h/h_scale)
# P(u) = sum(p_i * u^(p_min+i), i=0..n_num-1)
# Q(u) = 1 + sum(q_i * u^(i+1), i=0..n_den-1)
#
h_scale_fit  5.000000000000000e-01
#
# name  asym_cutoff  rpy_cutoff  p_min  n_num  n_den  p_0 .. p_{n_num-1}  q_0 .. q_{n_den-1}
